image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about p values nuance.
Context visual: P values determine if results are statistically significant, but the story doesn’t end there.
Escalation visual: A p value below 0.05 often gets all the attention, but it’s not a magic threshold.
Evidence visual: It can’t tell us how important or relevant a finding is—only if it’s unlikely to occur by chance.
Payoff visual: So, when you hear p values, remember: context matters, and results can always vary.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into statistics? Hit subscribe for more insights!
